title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 21.310 - Proof of publication
text:
21.310.  Proof of publication. — The proof of the publication of the notice shall be made by the affidavit of the publisher of the newspaper in which the notice is published, to which shall be attached a copy of the notice.  The proof of notice published by handbills shall be made by the affidavit of some person who signed the notice to which shall be attached a copy of the notice.
(RSMo 1939 § 12877, A.L. 1957 p. 595) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11252; 1919 § 7135; 1909 § 8131 
Proof of publication filed with general assembly, Const. Art. III § 42
